initial_program:
% -------------------------------------------------
%  Grid size and output cell
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(R)    :- R = 0..N-1.
col(C)    :- C = 0..M-1.
output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).

% -------------------------------------------------
%  Anchor for the colour that appears at the smallest column
%  (this becomes the anchor colour 1)
dummy_color1(C0,R0,Color1) :-
    input(R0, C0, Color1),
    C0 = #min{ C : input(R, C, Color1), Color1 != 0 },
    R0 = #min{ R : input(R, C0, Color1), Color1 != 0 }.

% -------------------------------------------------
%  Anchor for the colour that appears at the smallest column
%  (the other colour, 2)
dummy_color2(C2,R2,Color2) :-
    input(R2, C2, Color2),
    C2 = #min{ C : input(R, C, Color2), Color2 != 0 },
    R2 = #min{ R : input(R, C2, Color2), Color2 != 0 },
    Color2 != Color1.

% -------------------------------------------------
%  The other colour is the one different from colour 1 and nonzero
%  (this binds the colour value for the second colour)
distinct_color(Other) :- input(R, C, Other), Other != 0, Other != Color1.
1 { Color2 : distinct_color(Other) } 1 :- true.

% -------------------------------------------------
%  Choose which pattern is used.
%  Column pattern when the two colours are in different columns,
%  Row pattern when they are in the same column.
UseColumnPattern :- C0 != C2.
UseRowPattern    :- C0 = C2.

% Exactly one of the two patterns must hold.
1 { UseColumnPattern, UseRowPattern : true } 1 :- true.

% -------------------------------------------------
%  Output  column pattern
output(R,C,Color1) :- output_cell(R,C), UseColumnPattern, (C - C0) \ 4 = 0.
output(R,C,Color2) :- output_cell(R,C), UseColumnPattern, (C - C0) \ 4 = 2.
output(R,C,0)    :- output_cell(R,C), UseColumnPattern,
    not ((C - C0) \ 4 = 0), not ((C - C0) \ 4 = 2).

% -------------------------------------------------
%  Output  row pattern
output(R,C,Color1) :- output_cell(R,C), UseRowPattern, (R - R0) \ 4 = 0.
output(R,C,Color2) :- output_cell(R,C), UseRowPattern, (R - R0) \ 4 = 2.
output(R,C,0)    :- output_cell(R,C), UseRowPattern,
    not ((R - R0) \ 4 = 0), not ((R - R0) \ 4 = 2).

% -------------------------------------------------
%  Hide auxiliary facts, show only the output
#show output/3.

% -------------------------------------------------
%  Grid size and output cell
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(R)    :- R = 0..N-1.
col(C)    :- C = 0..M-1.
output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).

% -------------------------------------------------
%  Anchor for the colour that appears at the smallest column
%  (this becomes the anchor colour 1)
dummy_color1(C0,R0,Color1) :-
    input(R0, C0, Color1),
    C0 = #min{ C : input(R, C, Color1), Color1 != 0 },
    R0 = #min{ R : input(R, C0, Color1), Color1 != 0 }.

% -------------------------------------------------
%  Anchor for the colour that appears at the smallest column
%  (the other colour, 2)
dummy_color2(C2,R2,Color2) :-
    input(R2, C2, Color2),
    C2 = #min{ C : input(R, C, Color2), Color2 != 0 },
    R2 = #min{ R : input(R, C2, Color2), Color2 != 0 },
    Color2 != Color1.

% -------------------------------------------------
%  The other colour is the one different from colour 1 and nonzero
%  (this binds the colour value for the second colour)
distinct_color(Other) :- input(R, C, Other), Other != 0, Other != Color1.
% 1 { Color2 : distinct_color(Other) } 1 :- true.

% -------------------------------------------------
%  Choose which pattern is used.
%  Column pattern when the two colours are in different columns,
%  Row pattern when they are in the same column.
UseColumnPattern :- C0 != C2.
UseRowPattern    :- C0 = C2.

% Exactly one of the two patterns must hold.
1 { UseColumnPattern : true } 1 :- true.
1 { UseRowPattern : true } 1 :- true.
% -------------------------------------------------
%  Output  column pattern
output(R,C,Color1) :- output_cell(R,C), UseColumnPattern.
output(R,C,Color2) :- output_cell(R,C), UseColumnPattern.
output(R,C,0)    :- output_cell(R,C), UseColumnPattern.
    not ((C - C0) \ 4 = 0), not ((C - C0) \ 4 = 2).

% -------------------------------------------------
%  Output  row pattern
output(R,C,Color1) :- output_cell(R,C), UseRowPattern.
output(R,C,Color2) :- output_cell(R,C), UseRowPattern.
output(R,C,0)    :- output_cell(R,C), UseRowPattern.
    not ((R - R0) \ 4 = 0), not ((R - R0) \ 4 = 2).

%  Hide auxiliary facts, show only the output
#show output/3.
